title: Echnos Exhibition Dome
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:EchnosExhibitionDome-Journal4.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Echnos Exhibition Dome]]
The '''Echnos Exhibition Dome''' was a large dome placed at the very bottom of [[Echnos City]]. It was the venue of the popular weekly demolitions race, the [[BlastBoast 2000]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|4|Enemies for Life|reprint=1}}
